reviews.comment:
La atención de los empleados Excelente. Lo único malo es que no pude cargar combustible porque desde hacía 3 semanas que estaban sin sistema visa débito. deberían solucionar esto, hoy en día mucha gente usa débito , pasaron 3 semanas y no sabían cuando lo iban a reparar. Por suerte pude cargar en la YPF de monte quemado. A 50 km de Taco Pozo

(Translated by Google)
The staff was excellent. The only downside was that I couldn't fill up with fuel because they'd been without a Visa debit card for three weeks. They should fix this; many people use debit cards these days. Three weeks went by, and they didn't know when it would be fixed. Luckily, I was able to fill up at the YPF station in Monte Quemado. 50 km from Taco Pozo.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLNGZXYjBBRRAB
